Dashboard.evidence: Dashboard.jsx: 8 KPI cards (all clickable), goal tracker, EOD preview, activity feed with deep-links, MIDAS inline on failed payments, RevenueForecastCard with useQuery

Members.evidence: Members.jsx: CSV import modal (line 11, 153, 160), search/filter, bulk actions (export/status/message); MemberProfile.jsx: edit/cancel/pause dialogs, comp log (line 586), child linkage (parent_id), documents panel, emergency contact (lines 201-202, 336-337), health score (line 308), medical conditions (line 344), fighter toggle (lines 146-148)

Classes.evidence: Classes.jsx: split view, fill colors (green/yellow/red by fill %), roster, capacity override with auditLog (routes/classes.js:182), NLP scheduler (MissionControl.jsx:86-142), belt_levels LEFT JOIN in SQL (data/classes.js:124,174)

Leads.evidence: Leads.jsx: drag-drop pipeline, scoring, import (bulk export/delete), UTM fields stored (data/leads.js:8,86,102-104), win-back pipeline (Leads.jsx)

SocialMedia.evidence: SocialMedia.jsx: compose, calendar, campaigns, analytics, platform connections (line 601-655); TikTok = 'Coming Soon' (line 629-630)

Billing.evidence: Billing.jsx: MRR forecast (RevenueForecastCard), Stripe payment modal (lines 503-526 StripeWrapper+StripePaymentForm), Lightspeed sync button (Settings.jsx:911-915)

Staff.evidence: Staff.jsx: coach performance tab (lines 400-461: classes_taught, avg_fill_rate, pt_sessions, pt_revenue, attendance_rate, student_retention_rate), PT earnings tab (lines 463-495), compliance modal with certifications, expiring certs alert

Reports.evidence: Reports.jsx: Recharts LineChart/PieChart/AreaChart (lines 7-11), PDF export (handlePrintPDF/window.print()), CSV export (lines 746-773), conversion funnel (lines 622-727), class fill heatmap (lines 512-563), staff performance report

Settings.evidence: Settings.jsx: API keys management (lines 829-899: generate/view/revoke), 2FA (lines 1074-1144: setup QR+secret, verify, disable), Webhooks (lines 903-958: Lightspeed+Stripe, test sync), Role permissions (lines 961-1072: toggle switches, wildcard), general+notifications+belt config

Waivers.evidence: Waivers.jsx: templates CRUD, sign modal, member waivers, analytics; KioskWaiver.jsx + ParentSign.jsx exist; Backend route: POST /kiosk/verify-pin (waivers.js:190) but NO 3-attempt lockout (only rate limiting 20/min); Kids waiver: parent email link flow (Waivers.jsx:198-209) but no automated signing

POS.evidence: POS.jsx: cart, barcode scanning keyboard buffer (lines 48-75), receipt preview+print (lines 220-248 ReceiptPreview + window.print()), discounts

Gradings.evidence: Gradings.jsx: grading sessions, belt registry, result recording, CertificateModal client-side (lines 316-340), FighterLeaderboard tab+component (line 58, 355+), backend route GET /fighters/leaderboard (beltGrading.js:168-175)

AI_System.evidence: ZeusAgent (zeusAgent.js: event queue orchestrator with 24 event types, priority system, approval routing), MissionControl (MissionControl.jsx: agent cards, toggle, run now, NLP scheduler via /api/agents/nl-schedule), AIDashboard (AIDashboard.jsx: status, agents, token usage chart, HEALER proposals)

PerfectGym_Pages.evidence: AccessControl.jsx: useQuery + api.get('/api/settings') + hardcoded fallback (lines 29-43); ClassBooking.jsx: useQuery + api.get('/api/classes/instances') + hardcoded schedule (lines 36-43); PointOfSale.jsx: useQuery + api.get('/api/stock/products') + DEFAULT_PRODUCTS (lines 5-18); ReportingAnalytics.jsx: useQuery + api.get('/api/reports/*') + DEFAULT_KPIS (lines 6-28)

Backend_Routes.evidence: auditLog present on members (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), classes (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/instances), leads (GET/POST/PUT), staff (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), transactions (GET/POST) - MISSING on ALL waivers.js routes, MISSING on ALL socialMedia.js routes

Meta_API.evidence: metaApi.js: postToFacebook (line 20-30), postToInstagram (line 32-48), socialMedia.js publish route (line 107-151): uses metaApi for facebook/instagram, event_queue fallback for others

remaining_gaps.detail: TikTok option shows 'Coming Soon — requires separate TikTok Business API application' (SocialMedia.jsx:629-630). No backend integration exists.
Backend route POST /kiosk/verify-pin (waivers.js:190) validates 4-digit PIN but has no 3-strike lockout mechanism. Only rate limiting (kioskLimiter: 20 requests/min) at line 10.
Parent email input exists (Waivers.jsx:288-300) but sends link to parent email - no automated digital signing flow for minors. ParentSign.jsx requires manual link click.
Certificate generation is client-side only (Gradings.jsx CertificateModal lines 316-340). Backend has no certificate generation/storage endpoint.
All 14 waivers routes (templates CRUD, sign, kiosk, documents) lack auditLog middleware. backend/routes/waivers.js imports auth but not auditLog.
All 15 social media routes (posts CRUD, publish, platforms, hashtags, templates) lack auditLog middleware. backend/routes/socialMedia.js does not import auditLog.
Classes.jsx does not implement side-by-side comparison of different locations. Users can filter by location but not view two locations simultaneously.

remaining_gaps.gap: No class fill heatmap backend endpoint
remaining_gaps.detail: Frontend class fill heatmap (Reports.jsx:512-563) computes visualization from attendance report data client-side. There is no dedicated backend endpoint for heatmap data.
